def negative_yaml_load_same_payload_multiple_times():
    rule_id = "yaml_load_same_payload_multiple_times"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "The same YAML payload is parsed repeatedly within one function."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
